raw.message: 'Damn fun.' 'Wonderful mechanics.' 'A standout in this crowded mobile fighting genre.' - TouchArcade

hook.summary: High-energy character reveals with bold claims about the game's quality.
hook.visual_action: Quick transitions between stylized female fighters in combat-ready poses.
hook.text_overlay: ONE OF THE BEST FIGHTING GAMES... ...NOW AVAILABLE ON MOBILE!

scene_flow: Fast-paced character montage establishing the game's reputation as a top-tier fighter.
Transition to mobile platform announcement featuring the character Cerebella.
Spotlight on the exclusive mobile character, Annie of the Stars.
In-game combat demonstration on a mobile device showing combos and special moves.
End card with the game logo, victory animation, and a call to action.
on_screen_text: ONE OF THE BEST FIGHTING GAMES...
audience_proxy: Fans of competitive 2D fighting games and anime-style aesthetics looking for a high-quality mobile port.
